innateAbility.name: Prognosticate
innateAbility.description: Accurately predicts where the next Power Rune will spawn.

abilities.name: Fortune's End
abilities.description: Gathers his power into a bolt of scouring energy. Roots and dispels enemy units of buff within the radius when released.The potency of the root duration corresponds to the channel time.

abilities.name: Fate's Edict
abilities.description: Enraptures the affected unit, disarms and set its magic resistance to the max value.

abilities.name: Purifying Flames
abilities.description: Deals damage to the affected unit before causing them to heal over time.

abilities.name: Rain of Destiny
abilities.description: Damages and applies an incoming heal reduction for all affected enemy units within an area-targeted location.

abilities.name: Diviner's Deck
abilities.description: Grants self various bonus ability effects corresponding to the randomly selected card.The first buff granted is the current applied ability effects, whereas the second buff indicates the upcoming ability effects granted.

abilities.name: False Promise
abilities.description: Applies a strong dispel on the affected allied hero upon cast.Delays certain health restoration sources and all incoming damage sources until the ability duration ends. Any healing that is delayed is doubled at the end of the duration.
